cards:
How do I submit a new waiver application?
Click on the "+ New Application" button in the sidebar. You will be guided through the application process step by step. Make sure to have all required documentation ready before starting.
What is the typical review time for waiver applications?

How do I submit a new waiver application?
Click on the "+ New Application" button in the sidebar. You will be guided through the application process step by step. Make sure to have all required documentation ready before starting.
